name: Apple Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the eggs, sugar, oil, flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Gently fold in the grated apples and chopped walnuts into the batter.
3. Grease a tube or bundt pan and pour the batter into the prepared pan.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely before removing it from the pan.
6. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
